durationHours)<br>cancelReservation(reservationId)<br>checkIn(reservationId)<br>checkOut(reservationId)<br>markNoShow(reservationId)<br>getActiveReservations(member)<br>getReservation(reservationId)" target="o5GIHFEl5UfKnJvSwzKO-34" value="uses accumulated credit accounting for ETH payout"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.4722" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="2830" y="1930" /> <mxPoint x="2830" y="1930" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="o5GIHFEl5UfKnJvSwzKO-56" edge="1" parent="1" source="o5GIHFEl5UfKnJvSwzKO-38" target="o5GIHFEl5UfKnJvSwzKO-36" value="resolves operator wallet"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="2620" y="800" /> <mxPoint x="2620" y="940" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="o5GIHFEl5UfKnJvSwzKO-57" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;arcSize=8;strokeColor=#999999;fillColor=#fff7ed;fontFamily=Arial;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacing=10;fontSize=13;" value="<b>Main lifecycle</b><br>1. Member buys or renews membership. MembershipManager mints ParkCredits.<br>2. Member calls ParkingLedger.reserve(). Ledger checks membership, operator whitelist, category support, no overlap, and monthly caps.<br>3. Member calls checkIn(). Ledger deducts reserved-duration credits and allocates earnings to OperatorTreasury.<br>4. Member calls checkOut(). Ledger calculates overstay beyond grace period and charges extra credits if needed.<br>5. Operator withdraws accumulated earnings converted to ETH by OperatorTreasury." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="960" x="1645.0047247314453" y="100.00470947265626" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 430px; margin-left: 655px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 22px; font-family: Arial; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
ParkChain smart-contract schema
Contracts, methods, and intersections

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(241, 241, 241), rgb(30, 30, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(85, 85, 85), rgb(164, 164, 164));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 192px; height: 1px; padding-top: 935px; margin-left: 70px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Arial; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Admin / ParkChain Authority
whitelists operators
sets tiers and caps
sets grace period
sets exchange rate

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(241, 241, 241), rgb(30, 30, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(85, 85, 85), rgb(164, 164, 164));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 192px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1495px; margin-left: 60px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Arial; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Member
purchases membership
holds ParkCredits
reserves slot / bay
checks in and out
views balance and reservations

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(241, 241, 241), rgb(30, 30, 30)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(85, 85, 85), rgb(164, 164, 164));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 212px; height: 1px; padding-top: 535px; margin-left: 50px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Arial; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Operator
registered parking / EV provider
sets category prices
sets no-show fee
views and withdraws earnings

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(43, 76, 126), rgb(150, 178, 221));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1522px; height: 1px; padding-top: 2165px; margin-left: 560px;

display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Arial; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
ParkCredit
ERC-1155-compatible token
Methods
mint(to, amount)
burnFrom(from, amount)
safeTransferFrom(from, to, id, amount)
balanceOf(account, id)
setMinter(address)
setBurner(address)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(43, 76, 126), rgb(150, 178, 221));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 312px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1295px; margin-left: 1270px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Arial; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
MembershipManager
stores plans and member periods
tracks monthly hour caps
Methods
setTier(tierId, credits, priceEth, monthlyCapHours)
purchaseMembership(tierId)
renewMembership(tierId)
hasActiveMembership(member)
getMembership(member)
remainingHours(member, month, key)
consumeHours(member, operatorId, category, hours)

div.div:
OperatorRegistry
stores registered operators, categories, prices
Methods
registerOperator(id, wallet, name, categories)
removeOperator(id)
setPricePerHour(id, category, priceCredits)
setNoShowFee(id, feeCredits)
isWhitelisted(id)
supportsCategory(id, category)
getPrice(id, category)
getNoShowFee(id)
getOperatorWallet(id)

div.div:
ParkingLedger
main business-process contract
stores reservations and lifecycle state
Methods
setGracePeriod(minutes)
reserve(operatorId, category, startTime, durationHours)
cancelReservation(reservationId)
checkIn(reservationId)
checkOut(reservationId)
markNoShow(reservationId)
getActiveReservations(member)
getReservation(reservationId)

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(219, 234, 254), rgb(26, 39, 56)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(43, 76, 126), rgb(150, 178, 221));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 242px; height: 1px; padding-top: 575px; margin-left: 1510px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Arial; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
OperatorTreasury
accumulates operator earnings and converts credits to ETH
Methods
setCreditToEthRate(rate)
allocateEarnings(operatorId, credits)
getEarnings(operatorId)
withdraw(operatorId)
withdrawableEth(operatorId)

div.div:
Legend
solid arrow = write / state-changing call
dashed arrow = read / validation call
ParkingLedger is the central lifecycle coordinator

div.div:
Main lifecycle
1. Member buys or renews membership. MembershipManager mints ParkCredits.
2. Member calls ParkingLedger.reserve(). Ledger checks membership, operator whitelist, category support, no overlap, and monthly caps.
3. Member calls checkIn(). Ledger deducts reserved-duration credits and allocates earnings to OperatorTreasury.
4. Member calls checkOut(). Ledger calculates overstay beyond grace period and charges extra credits if needed.
5. Operator withdraws accumulated earnings converted to ETH by OperatorTreasury.
